caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden podium in a room with a distinctive textured green stone wall behind him. He is dressed in a light-colored traditional Indian outfit consisting of a long-sleeved shirt and a matching sleeveless Nehru jacket. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. Throughout the sequence, he is speaking and using hand gestures to emphasize his points. He begins by gesturing with his right hand near his chest, then moves into a more neutral stance with his arms at his sides. He then transitions into more active gesturing, raising both hands with fingers extended to stress a point. The background remains constant, featuring a vertical decorative pillar with small pink flowers and a geometric pattern carved into the green marble wall. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
